answer:
The University Dining offers a variety of locations and services for students, faculty, staff, and guests to enjoy meals at Kennesaw State University (KSU). The main dining halls include Stingers Dining Hall with its freshly sliced meat options from Blue Print Deli, My Pantry featuring an all-day breakfast bar, Farm Basket offering a selection of vegetables, proteins and house-made dressings along with two daily soup choices. There's also Slice of π (Pi) for sweet treats including gluten-free, vegan, and vegetarian options.

Additionally, there are specialty dining locations such as The Commons Dining Hall which offers Southern food like fried chicken rolls, mac n' cheese, corn bread among others; Apron Strings serving Italian pasta, pizza with garlic knots; and Miso Caliente offering Japanese-inspired offerings including rice dishes.

For grab-and-go meals on campus, The Village Market provides prepackaged hot prepared meals from University Dining available Monday through Thursday starting at 4:00 PM with a menu of classic pasta dishes rotating weekly. There's also the On-Campus Convenience Store called 'The Market,' where you can find snacks, frozen food items like meals and pizzas as well as beverages including Coca-Cola bottled or in cases.

Lastly, for those who prefer to dine at The Grill on campus, they offer grass-fed hamburgers, hot dogs, chicken sausages with a variety of fries and rotating specialty items available all week long but note that the Door Entry Rate applies here as well.

sources.Title: Hours and Locations - University Dining
sources.Text: Stingers Dining Hall In an effort to promote safety in our dining halls, all KSU students, faculty, staff and guests are required to present photo ID or Talon Card upon entry. Dine-in and Takeout Club Hours Monday – Thursday | 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM Friday | 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM Saturday | 10:30 AM – 7:00 PM Sunday | 10:30 AM – 9:00 PM Blue Print Deli: Freshly sliced meats with a variety of toppings, including vegan and vegetarian options. My Pantry: All-day breakfast bar featuring a self-serve waffle station, bagels and cereals. Farm Basket: Fresh vegetable assortment, proteins and house-made dressings, along with two daily soup options. Slice of π (Pi) : Sweet treats including gluten-free, vegan and vegetarian options. The Grill: Grass-fed hamburgers, hot dogs and chicken sausages with a variety of fries and rotating specialty items. Please ask a server for vegan and vegetarian options: garden burgers, black bean burgers and veggie chicken nuggets. Door Entry Rate (Credit/Debit Card and KCash): Breakfast: $10.50 plus tax Lunch/Dinner: $14.00 plus tax Dining Dollars Rate Breakfast: $9.50 Lunch/Dinner: $11.75 OR One Meal Plan entry Cash is not accepted, checks are only accepted for groups.

sources.Title: Graduate Admissions
sources.Text: You’ve got a big decision to make. See for yourself why KSU is the ideal choice. Our in-person campus tours are designed specifically for students and their families. Led by a tour guide, the campus tour highlights academic programs, housing, dining and admissions. You can choose to visit both the Kennesaw and Marietta campuses or the campus that houses your area of academic interest. Take a Virtual Tour Apply Now

sources.Text: The Commons Dining Hall In an effort to promote safety in our dining halls, all KSU students, faculty, staff and guests are required to present photo ID or Talon Card upon entry. Dine-in Monday – Thursday | 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM Friday | 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM Saturday | 10:30 AM – 7:00 PM Sunday | 10:30 AM – 9:00 PM Apron Strings: Southern food, including fried chicken, rolls, mac n' cheese, collard greens, corn bread Piatti: pasta, pizza, garlic knots The Perch: sandwiches, wraps, fresh veggies and hummus, soup du jour Hwy 41: burgers, grilled cheese, fries, hotdogs Globe Trotter: various cultural foods from around the world Miso Caliente: fried rice, lo mein, chips and salsa, burritos The Campus Green: salads and fresh vegetables Stone Mill Bakery: dessert items (varies daily) The Grind Coffee Co.: coffee, lattes, iced coffees, americanos, cappuccinos, frappuccinos Door Entry Rate (Credit/Debit Card and KCash) Breakfast: $10.50 plus tax Lunch/Dinner: $14.00 plus tax Dining Dollars Rate Breakfast: $9.50 Lunch/Dinner: $11.75 OR One Meal Plan entry Cash is not accepted, checks are only accepted for groups.

sources.Title: Accepted Student Next Steps - Undergraduate Admissions
sources.Text: Office The Bursar's Office is where you can find information on tuition and payment options. You are encouraged to explore your options well in advance of the first day of classes. You can view the balance owed on Owl Express.

sources.Title: The Market - University Dining
sources.Text:
Visit the On-Campus Convenience Store

Welcome to The Market, Kennesaw State University's on-campus convenience store, where you can pick up snacks, frozen foods, drinks and more. It's the perfect place to stop for your morning coffee, snacks between class or meals on-the-go.

Product Offering

Fresh-baked cookies Individually packaged deli sandwiches Full-sized grocery items (milk, eggs, cereal and more) Frozen meals and pizzas
